ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-24-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-18-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: George Holland, via CourtCall, counsel for Timothy Hoffman, Petitioner.

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. Court and counsel confirm that the will being admitted is a copy of the Will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The Lost Will dated October 17, 2012 is admitted to probate. Timothy Hoffman is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 24, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
